headline: Oil Prices Approach $90 As Iran Holds Supply Hostage
summary: Oil prices surged to multiyear highs Friday as the Iran conflict tightened global supplies. Refiners and U.S. and Canadian producers rallied.

headline: Jobs Report: Payrolls Dive In Shock To Wall Street; S&P 500 Futures Sink (Live Coverage)
summary: The February jobs report showed payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000. S&P 500 futures added to losses. The Federal Reserve is in a tough spot.

headline: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.
